Enrol a Device

Choose how to link the new device to your account.

Enter pairing code

Run silkie enroll on the device. It will display a 6-character code — enter it below.

—
or

SSO from the device

If you're sitting at the machine, run the command below. A browser will open and the device will enrol automatically once you sign in.

silkie enroll --sso

The CLI polls every 5 seconds and completes enrollment automatically after login.

Danger Zone

Terminate all sessions

Immediately close every active session and invalidate credentials

Revoke all device registrations

All devices will need to re-enroll with new bootstrap tokens
